upstream_options.description: Directory to install HTML docs to. Defaults to <datadir>/doc/git-doc
upstream_options.name: htmldir

upstream_options.description: Directory to install perl lib to. Defaults to <datadir>/perl5
upstream_options.name: perllibdir

upstream_options.description: Fall-back pager.
upstream_options.name: default_pager

upstream_options.description: Fall-back editor.
upstream_options.name: default_editor

upstream_options.description: Environment used when spawning the pager
upstream_options.name: pager_environment

upstream_options.description: Install bundled copies of CPAN modules that serve as a fallback in case the modules are not available on the system.
upstream_options.name: perl_cpan_fallback

upstream_options.description: Resolve ancillary tooling and support files relative to the location of the runtime binary instead of hard-coding them into the binary.
upstream_options.name: runtime_prefix

upstream_options.description: An array of paths to pick up tools from in case the normal tools are broken or lacking.
upstream_options.name: sane_tool_path

upstream_options.description: Build date reported by our documentation.
upstream_options.name: build_date

upstream_options.description: User agent reported to remote servers.
upstream_options.name: user_agent

upstream_options.description: Contributed features to include.
upstream_options.name: contrib

upstream_options.description: Contributed features to include.
upstream_options.name: credential_helpers

upstream_options.description: Build helpers used to access remotes with the HTTP transport.
upstream_options.name: curl

upstream_options.description: Build helpers used to push to remotes with the HTTP transport.
upstream_options.name: expat

upstream_options.description: Build translation files.
upstream_options.name: gettext

upstream_options.description: Build Git web interface. Requires Perl.
upstream_options.name: gitweb

upstream_options.description: Support reencoding strings with different encodings.
upstream_options.name: iconv

upstream_options.description: Build tools written in Perl.
upstream_options.name: perl

upstream_options.description: Build tools written in Python.
upstream_options.name: python

upstream_options.description: Use the system-provided regex library instead of the bundled one.
upstream_options.name: regex

upstream_options.description: The backend to use for generating cryptographically-secure pseudo-random numbers.
upstream_options.name: csprng_backend

upstream_options.description: The HTTPS backend to use when connecting to remotes.
upstream_options.name: https_backend

upstream_options.description: The backend used for hashing objects with the SHA1 object format.
upstream_options.name: sha1_backend

upstream_options.description: The backend used for hashing data with the SHA1 object format in case no cryptographic security is needed.
upstream_options.name: sha1_unsafe_backend

upstream_options.description: The backend used for hashing objects with the SHA256 object format.
upstream_options.name: sha256_backend

upstream_options.description: The backend used for compressing objects and other data.
upstream_options.name: zlib_backend

upstream_options.description: Enable upcoming breaking changes.
upstream_options.name: breaking_changes

upstream_options.description: Enable building with Rust.
upstream_options.name: rust

upstream_options.description: Use gettext from Homebrew instead of the slightly-broken system-provided one.
upstream_options.name: macos_use_homebrew_gettext

upstream_options.description: Which documenattion formats to build and install.
upstream_options.name: docs

upstream_options.description: Which backend to use to generate documentation.
upstream_options.name: docs_backend

upstream_options.description: Enable benchmarks. This requires Perl and GNU time.
upstream_options.name: benchmarks

upstream_options.description: Repository to copy for the performance tests. Should be at least the size of the Git repository.
upstream_options.name: benchmark_repo

upstream_options.description: Large repository to copy for the performance tests. Should be at least the size of the Linux repository.
upstream_options.name: benchmark_large_repo

upstream_options.description: Number of times a test should be repeated for best-of-N measurements.
upstream_options.name: benchmark_repeat_count

upstream_options.description: Provide a coccicheck target that generates a Coccinelle patch.
upstream_options.name: coccinelle

upstream_options.description: Enable building tests. This requires Perl, but is separate from the
upstream_options.name: tests

upstream_options.description: Path to the directory used to store test outputs
upstream_options.name: test_output_directory

upstream_options.description: Name of a UTF-8 locale used for testing.
upstream_options.name: test_utf8_locale

upstream_options.description: Enable building fuzzers.
upstream_options.name: fuzzers
